nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Magnolia warbler
nodes.summary: Magnolia warbler（Magnolia warbler，学名 Setophaga magnolia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: While the deforestation does decrease the warbler population in the specific area that it occurs in, the species is not significantly impacted overall due to the general abundance of the species throughout the region.{{cite journal|last1=Germaine|first1= S
